items.title: 🚨NEW: Kelsey Plum was spent, a byproduct of the physical nature of Wednesday’s game. But her teammates picked her up, and the Los Angeles Sparks got the job done. This is a team that, believe it or not, is surging on defense over their last five games. 🔗 justinrusso.substack.com/

items.title: More from Mitch on the 30-point second half:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
More from Mitch on the 30-point second half:

"We got on our heels, missed some shots. You don't get as many free throws, high-percentage looks when you play on your heels like that."

items.title: Mitch Johnson on Spurs scoring just 30 after the break:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Mitch Johnson on Spurs scoring just 30 after the break: 

"We got away from what got us the 76 points in the first half just in terms of putting pressure on the rim, rolling after screens, running, continuing to find the paint, whether it's for ourselves or for our teammate."

The regular-season was kind of a slog this year, outside of Victor Wembanyama's emergence.

The playoffs? Just incredible. Somehow better than last year's playoffs, which were pretty amazing too.

items.title: Late-night thoughts: that Fox sequence could end up being the kind of sequence that has reverberations. Assuming Knicks win (still a big if!) do the bad vibes around that play + his long term fit with Castle and Harper there cause SA to move him sooner than they otherwise might?
items.author: Chris Hine

items.title: 🏆 GAME 4 FINAL SCORE 🏆
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
🏆 GAME 4 FINAL SCORE 🏆

Jalen Brunson's 36 points and OG Anunoby's go-ahead tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining secures a Game 4 win at MSG and a 3-1 series lead for the Knicks!

OG Anunoby: 33 PTS, 10-15 FGM, 7-9 3PM

Game 5: Saturday, 8:30pm/et, ABC
